firmware.title: Fairphone 3/3+ Android 11 (4.A.0019.1) Update
firmware.description:
Software 4.A.0019.1 is available for your Fairphone 3 and Fairphone 3+.


This update also includes:
- Security patch level: 5th of December, 2022


Note that it may take some time for the update process to complete. It will not be possible to use your device during this time. This includes not being able to make emergency calls.

Please note that data charges may apply.

firmware.title: Fairphone 3/3+ Android 13 (6.A.020.0) Update
firmware.description:
Software 6.A.020.0 is available for your Fairphone 3 or Fairphone 3+.
This system update includes the following changes:

Resolved issues
  • A bug that was causing the hotspot/tethering not to work when used in combination with some VPNs has been corrected.
Other improvements
  • WPA3 encryption has been enabled for Wi-Fi connections.
  • Camera and overall stability of the system have been improved.
  • Security patch level: 5th of August, 2023

More information


Note that it may take some time for the update process to complete. It will not be possible to use your device during this time. This includes not being able to make emergency calls.

Please note that data charges may apply.

firmware.title: Fairphone 3/3+ Android 13 (6.A.022.1) Update
firmware.description:
Software 6.A.022.1 is available for your Fairphone 3 or Fairphone 3+.
This system update includes the following changes:

Resolved issues
  • Ringing tone can be heard on outgoing phone calls.
  • Customising your Wallpaper & Style using My Photos no longer crashes.
  • Faster SIM card unlock for users entering their PIN after reboot.
  • Sound Recorder app recording issue is now solved.
  • Manual network selection, which was unavailable on certain networks, is now available again.
Other improvements
  • Security patch level: 5th of October, 2023

More information


Note that it may take some time for the update process to complete. It will not be possible to use your device during this time. This includes not being able to make emergency calls.

Please note that data charges may apply.

firmware.title: Fairphone 3/3+ Android 13 (6.A.023.1) Update
firmware.description:
Software 6.A.023.1 is available for your Fairphone 3 or Fairphone 3+.
This system update includes the following changes:

Resolved issues
  • Videos will now be saved correctly when, during a recording, an incoming call is accepted.
  • The preview for Panorama mode has been fixed.
  • Miracast screen casting is now available again.
Other improvements
  • Security patch level: 5th of December, 2023

More information


Note that it may take some time for the update process to complete. It will not be possible to use your device during this time. This includes not being able to make emergency calls.

Please note that data charges may apply.
